creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Hi Koichiro, thanks for the bug report.

I am indeed trying to resurrect the net/remmina-plugin-rdp port, but there are still some clashes in versions of Remmina and FreeRDP which support each other.

The current state of Remmina v1.2.0-rcgit.16 is that it supports FreeRDP v2.0.0-pre-release up until 6th October 2016, where a LARGE number of commits were may to the FreeRDP github repository. Likely the last version of FreeRDP supported was GitHub commit bfdab0e.

There are a number of issues reported on the Remmina Github issues tracker regarding this problem. One such example is:
https://github.com/FreeRDP/Remmina/issues/1012

The general concensus is that we just have to wait a bit longer for Remmina to catch up to the current FreeRDP API.
